Neon Hall.refund: Refunds are available only if the event is cancelled or moved.
Neon Hall.transfer: Mobile ticket transfer opens 48 hours before doors.
Neon Hall.accessibility: Accessible seating is available in Balcony and Lower Bowl.
Neon Hall.parking: Paid parking is available in the Neon Garage.

Summit Theater.refund: Refunds are available for cancelled events. Exchanges are not guaranteed.
Summit Theater.transfer: Transfers are allowed until two hours before doors.
Summit Theater.accessibility: Accessible entrances and companion seats are available.
Summit Theater.parking: Street parking and transit are recommended.

Lakefront Room.refund: Jazz table tickets are non-refundable unless the event is cancelled.
Lakefront Room.transfer: Transfers require the original buyer's mobile account.
Lakefront Room.accessibility: Accessible table seating is limited and should be selected at purchase.
Lakefront Room.parking: Validated garage parking is available after 18:00.

Red River Amphitheater.refund: Outdoor shows continue rain or shine unless the venue announces cancellation.
Red River Amphitheater.transfer: Transfers are allowed for all sections.
Red River Amphitheater.accessibility: Accessible lawn and covered bowl sections are available.
Red River Amphitheater.parking: Parking bundles can be added during checkout.

Peachtree Ballroom.refund: Refunds are not available after purchase unless the event is cancelled.
Peachtree Ballroom.transfer: Transfers are allowed until noon on event day.
Peachtree Ballroom.parking: Nearby garage parking is not included with the ticket.

Harbor Dome.refund: Refunds are available only for cancelled or postponed events.
Harbor Dome.transfer: Transfer is restricted until 24 hours before doors for high-demand shows.
Harbor Dome.accessibility: Accessible upper and lower bowl seats are available.

limits: TicketMate is a fictional workshop app and does not sell real tickets.
Inventory and pricing are static demo data.
Do not enter real payment, identity, or private customer information.
